narrative:
Twin Township has 1,864 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.2 percentage points.
